title: Briful Artificial Fern Branch Boston Fern Plants, Artificial Plant, Plastic Fern Leaves, Artificial Plant Branch for Indoor Garden, Porch, Parterre, Table Decoration, Flower Arrangements, 76 cm Long
features: Each fern stem gives the appearance of real, natural fern plant. Artificial fern is a practical alternative to real plants and will remain fresh-looking and beautiful year after year.
One package of these artificial plants includes 3 thick bundles, measuring 30 inches in height and 6 inches in width. They are made from a durable plastic material.
The flexible stems allow you to assemble them and bend them into the shapes you need and the packet of 3 provides additional options for a large feature or a few smaller bouquets.

Fern leaves are made of high-quality plastic that is UV resistant so it doesn’t fade, waterproof for indoor or outdoor use and wipes clean with a damp cloth. Made of UV resistant plastic that is maintenance-free and eco-friendly, you simply rinse these ferns with water to keep them clean and debris free.

Bring nature effortlessly into your home with a life-like faux fern spray! Whether you’re decorating a trellis, outdoor gazebo or adding delicate greenery for a wedding, this option is best the competitors for draping or vining.
